<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/qrious/4.0.2/qrious.min.js"></script>
<style>
  :root{
    /* tech-noir: Blade Runner haze · Dune weight · Matrix system-glow · DC chiaroscuro */
    --bg:#070809; --bg2:#0c0f14; --ink:#eef2f7; --dim:#8b96a6; --faint:#4a5360;
    --amber:#e6a042; --amber-glow:#ffc977; --oxblood:#8f2f28; --teal:#46c8c0; --teal-glow:#7af0e8;
    --phosphor:#5fd3a0; --line:#1c232e;
    --card:#10141b; --card2:#151a23; --paper:#ece1c8; --paper-ink:#241f17; --paper-line:#c2b394;
    --serif:"Fraunces",Georgia,serif; --sans:"IBM Plex Sans",system-ui,sans-serif; --mono:"IBM Plex Mono",monospace;
  }
  /* Theme override (chosen in the wizard); empty => built-in look */
  
  *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
  html,body{height:100%}
  body{
    background:
      radial-gradient(1100px 700px at 78% -12%, rgba(230,160,66,.10) 0%, transparent 55%),
      radial-gradient(900px 900px at 12% 108%, rgba(70,200,192,.07) 0%, transparent 55%),
      radial-gradient(1400px 1000px at 50% 50%, #0c1016 0%, var(--bg) 70%) fixed,
      var(--bg);
    color:var(--ink);font-family:var(--sans);overflow:hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }
  #deck{position:fixed;inset:0;}
  .slide{
    position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    padding:6vh 7vw;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transform:translateX(40px);
    transition:opacity .5s ease,transform .5s ease,visibility .5s;
    overflow-y:auto;
  }
  .slide.active{opacity:1;visibility:visible;transform:none;z-index:2;}
  .slide.prev{transform:translateX(-40px);}
  .wrap{width:min(1000px,100%);}
  .eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;
    letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--amber);margin-bottom:22px;}
  .eyebrow .num{display:inline-grid;place-items:center;width:30px;height:30px;border:1px solid var(--amber);
    border-radius:50%;font-weight:500;color:var(--amber);}
  .eyebrow .bar{flex:0 0 46px;height:1px;background:var(--amber);opacity:.6}
  h1{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(38px,7vw,84px);line-height:1.02;
    letter-spacing:-.02em;margin-bottom:18px;}
  h2.head{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(30px,5vw,60px);line-height:1.05;
    letter-spacing:-.015em;margin-bottom:18px;}
  .sub{font-size:clamp(17px,2.2vw,23px);color:var(--dim);max-width:46ch;line-height:1.5;font-weight:400;}
  .lede{font-size:clamp(16px,2vw,21px);line-height:1.55;max-width:60ch;margin-bottom:26px;}
  .lede.dim{color:var(--dim);}
  .kicker{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--teal);margin-top:30px;}
  .grid{display:grid;gap:16px;margin-top:26px;}
  .g2{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
  .g3{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);}
  @media(max-width:760px){.g2,.g3{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
  .card{background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--card2));border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:14px;padding:20px 18px;}
  .card h3{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:600;font-size:20px;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--ink);}
  .card p{font-size:14.5px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--dim);}
  .card .ic{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--amber);letter-spacing:.1em;margin-bottom:10px;}
  .stat{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(30px,5vw,52px);color:var(--amber);line-height:1;}
  .stat .u{font-size:.4em;color:var(--dim);font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.05em;}
  .src{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11.5px;color:var(--faint);margin-top:22px;letter-spacing:.03em;}
  /* layered stack diagram */
  .layers{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;margin-top:8px;}
  .layer{border-radius:13px;padding:16px 18px;border:1px solid var(--line);position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
  .layer .tag{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:7px;opacity:.85;}
  .layer h3{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:600;font-size:19px;margin-bottom:5px;}
  .layer p{font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--dim);}
  .layer.l1{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(158,59,50,.22),rgba(158,59,50,.05));border-color:rgba(158,59,50,.5);}
  .layer.l1 .tag{color:#e08a80;}
  .layer.l2{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(232,163,61,.2),rgba(232,163,61,.04));border-color:rgba(232,163,61,.5);}
  .layer.l2 .tag{color:var(--amber);}
  .layer.l3{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(63,182,168,.18),rgba(63,182,168,.04));border-color:rgba(63,182,168,.45);}
  .layer.l3 .tag{color:var(--teal);}
  .hierarchy{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:20px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;}
  .hierarchy .h{padding:6px 12px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:20px;background:var(--card);letter-spacing:.04em;}
  .hierarchy .arrow{color:var(--amber);font-size:16px;}
  /* deep dive button + paper layer */
  .deepbtn{margin-top:26px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--amber);color:var(--amber);
    font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.06em;padding:11px 18px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;
    transition:background .2s,color .2s;}
  .deepbtn:hover{background:var(--amber);color:#1a1206;}
  .deepdive-open{display:block;margin-top:22px;width:100%;text-align:center;font-weight:600;}
  #paper{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--paper);color:var(--paper-ink);z-index:50;
    transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform .45s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);overflow-y:auto;}
  #paper.open{transform:none;}
  .paper-inner{max-width:760px;margin:0 auto;padding:64px 28px 120px;}
  .paper-secnum{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--oxblood);margin-bottom:14px;}
  #paper h1{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(28px,4.5vw,46px);color:var(--paper-ink);margin-bottom:24px;line-height:1.08;}
  #paper h3{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:600;font-size:22px;margin:26px 0 8px;color:#403a2e;}
  #paper p{font-size:16.5px;line-height:1.62;margin-bottom:14px;}
  #paper p.ref{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12.5px;color:#7a6f56;border-top:1px solid var(--paper-line);padding-top:16px;margin-top:30px;}
  #paper b{color:#2a2620;}
  .pcallout{background:rgba(158,59,50,.08);border-left:3px solid var(--oxblood);border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;padding:14px 18px;margin:22px 0;}
  .pcallout .l{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--oxblood);margin-bottom:6px;}
  .pclose{position:fixed;top:18px;right:20px;z-index:60;background:var(--oxblood);color:#fff;border:0;
    width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;font-size:20px;cursor:pointer;}
  /* nav + controls */
  #nav{position:fixed;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;height:54px;display:flex;align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;padding:0 18px;z-index:20;
    background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(8,10,14,.9),transparent);}
  .progress{flex:1;height:3px;background:var(--line);border-radius:3px;margin:0 16px;overflow:hidden;}
  .progress > i{display:block;height:100%;width:0;background:var(--amber);transition:width .4s;}
  .navbtn{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--ink);width:38px;height:34px;
    border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:16px;}
  .navbtn:active{transform:scale(.94);}
  .navarrows{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex:0 0 auto;}
  .counter{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--dim);min-width:54px;text-align:center;}
  /* floating buttons */
  #tools{position:fixed;right:16px;top:16px;z-index:25;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:8px;}
  .tools-items{display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:8px;}
  #tools.open .tools-items{display:flex;}
  #tools.open .tools-toggle{border-color:var(--amber);color:var(--amber);}
  .tools-live{background:rgba(230,160,66,.16)!important;border-color:rgba(230,160,66,.55)!important;color:var(--amber)!important;}
  .toolbtn{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--ink);font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.04em;padding:9px 13px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;}
  .toolbtn:hover{border-color:var(--amber);color:var(--amber);}
  /* Listen-mode control bar */
  #listenBar{position:fixed;left:50%;bottom:18px;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(20px);z-index:65;display:none;align-items:center;gap:14px;
    background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--bg2));border:1px solid rgba(230,160,66,.5);border-radius:14px;
    padding:10px 14px;box-shadow:0 10px 40px -12px rgba(0,0,0,.7),0 0 30px -14px rgba(230,160,66,.6);
    max-width:min(620px,92vw);opacity:0;transition:opacity .25s,transform .25s;}
  #listenBar.on{display:flex;opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);}
  #listenStatus{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;line-height:1.4;color:var(--dim);flex:1;min-width:0;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;}
  #listenBar .lb-btns{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0;}
  .lb-btn{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--ink);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:14px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:9px;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s,color .2s,background .2s;}
  .lb-btn:hover{border-color:var(--amber);color:var(--amber);}
  .lb-ask{background:rgba(230,160,66,.14);border-color:rgba(230,160,66,.5);color:var(--amber);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.03em;}
  .lb-ask:hover{background:rgba(230,160,66,.24);}
  @media(max-width:760px){
    #listenStatus{white-space:normal;font-size:11px;}
    #listenBar{bottom:60px;gap:10px;padding:9px 11px;}
    .lb-ask{font-size:11px;padding:8px 10px;}
  }
  /* QR */
  .qrbox{display:inline-flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-top:30px;
    background:#fff;padding:14px;border-radius:12px;}
  .qrbox canvas{display:block;border-radius:4px;}
  .qrbox span{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:#333;letter-spacing:.06em;}
  /* modal (poll / words / chat) */
  .modal{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(6,8,11,.78);z-index:70;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;}
  .modal.open{display:flex;}
  .panel{width:min(540px,100%);max-height:86vh;overflow-y:auto;background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--bg2));
    border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;padding:26px 24px;}
  .panel h3{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:24px;margin-bottom:6px;}
  .panel .desc{color:var(--dim);font-size:14px;margin-bottom:18px;line-height:1.5;}
  .opt{display:block;width:100%;text-align:left;background:var(--card2);border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--ink);
    padding:13px 15px;border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:15px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
  .opt .fill{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(232,163,61,.18);width:0;transition:width .5s;z-index:0;}
  .opt .lbl,.opt .pct{position:relative;z-index:1;}
  .opt .pct{float:right;font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--amber);}
  .opt:hover{border-color:var(--amber);}
  .wordin,.chatin{width:100%;background:var(--card2);border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--ink);
    padding:12px 14px;border-radius:10px;font-size:15px;font-family:var(--sans);}
  .cloud{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-top:18px;align-items:baseline;}
  .cloud span{font-family:var(--serif);color:var(--teal);line-height:1;}
  .btn{background:var(--amber);color:#1a1206;border:0;padding:11px 18px;border-radius:9px;font-weight:600;
    cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;margin-top:12px;font-family:var(--sans);}
  .btn.ghost{background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--dim);}
  .chatlog{margin-top:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}
  .msg{padding:11px 14px;border-radius:12px;font-size:14.5px;line-height:1.5;max-width:90%;}
  .msg.u{align-self:flex-end;background:var(--card2);border:1px solid var(--line);}
  .msg.a{align-self:flex-start;background:rgba(63,182,168,.1);border:1px solid rgba(63,182,168,.3);}
  .muted{color:var(--faint);font-size:12px;font-family:var(--mono);margin-top:8px;}
  /* Technical Reference Edition elements */
  .card .k{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--amber);margin-bottom:8px;}
  .stat{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(28px,4.5vw,46px);color:var(--amber);line-height:1;margin-bottom:8px;}
  .ticks{list-style:none;margin-top:22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;}
  .ticks li{position:relative;padding-left:22px;font-size:15px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--dim);}
  .ticks li b{color:var(--ink);}
  .ticks li:before{content:"\203A";position:absolute;left:0;color:var(--amber);font-size:18px;line-height:1.2;}
  .callout{margin-top:22px;border-radius:0 10px 10px 0;padding:14px 18px;background:rgba(63,182,168,.08);border-left:3px solid var(--teal);}
  .callout.oxblood{background:rgba(158,59,50,.1);border-left-color:var(--oxblood);}
  .callout.explain{background:rgba(232,163,61,.08);border-left-color:var(--amber);}
  .callout .lab{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:6px;}
  .callout.oxblood .lab{color:#e08a80;}
  .callout.explain .lab{color:var(--amber);}
  .callout p{font-size:14.5px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--dim);}
  .callout b{color:var(--ink);}
  .reflist{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin-top:24px;}
  .reflist a{display:block;background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--card2));border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:15px 16px;text-decoration:none;transition:border-color .2s;}
  .reflist a:hover{border-color:var(--amber);}
  .reflist .who{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:600;font-size:16px;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:4px;}
  .reflist .why{font-size:13px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--dim);}
  #paper table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:18px 0;font-size:14.5px;}
  #paper th,#paper td{text-align:left;padding:8px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--paper-line);}
  #paper th{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--oxblood);}
  #paper ul{margin:12px 0 12px 22px;}
  #paper li{font-size:16px;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:8px;}
  @media(max-width:760px){.reflist{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
  /* ===== expandable agent/figure grid (reused layout) ===== */
  .agentgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin-top:22px;}
  @media(max-width:760px){.agentgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
  .agrp{background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--card2));border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 15px;}
  .agrp .tag{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--amber);margin-bottom:6px;}
  .agrp p{font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--dim);}
  .modes{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;margin-top:22px;}
  @media(max-width:760px){.modes{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}}
  .mode{background:var(--card2);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;}
  .mode b{display:block;font-family:var(--serif);font-size:17px;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:3px;}
  .mode span{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:.03em;}
  .mode.def{border-color:var(--amber);background:rgba(232,163,61,.1);}
  .mode.def b{color:var(--amber);}
  .mode.opt{border-color:var(--teal);background:rgba(63,182,168,.08);}
  .mode.opt b{color:var(--teal);}
  .rule{margin-top:18px;padding:14px 18px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(158,59,50,.12);border:1px solid rgba(158,59,50,.5);font-family:var(--serif);font-size:17px;color:var(--ink);text-align:center;}
  .risktable{margin-top:22px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;}
  .risktable .rrow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0;}
  .risktable .rrow > span{padding:12px 15px;font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--dim);border-top:1px solid var(--line);}
  .risktable .rrow > span:first-child{border-right:1px solid var(--line);}
  .risktable .rrow b{color:var(--ink);}
  .risktable .rhead > span{background:var(--card2);color:var(--amber);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;border-top:0;}
  @media(max-width:760px){.risktable .rrow{grid-template-columns:1fr;}.risktable .rrow > span:first-child{border-right:0;}}
  .twocol{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-top:22px;}
  @media(max-width:760px){.twocol{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
  .twocol .col{border-radius:12px;padding:16px 18px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--card2));}
  .twocol .col.cap{border-left:3px solid var(--amber);}
  .twocol .col .tag{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--amber);margin-bottom:8px;}
  .twocol .col p{font-size:14px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--dim);margin-bottom:8px;}
  .twocol .col b{color:var(--ink);}
  .twocol .col .mini{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--faint);font-style:italic;margin-bottom:0;}
  .triangle{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin-top:22px;}
  @media(max-width:760px){.triangle{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
  .vtx{text-align:center;background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--card2));border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:18px 14px;}
  .vtx b{display:block;font-family:var(--serif);font-size:20px;color:var(--amber);margin-bottom:6px;}
  .vtx span{font-size:13px;color:var(--dim);line-height:1.4;}
  .distinction{margin-top:20px;padding:14px 18px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(63,182,168,.08);border-left:3px solid var(--teal);}
  .distinction .lab{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:6px;}
  .distinction p{font-size:14.5px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--dim);}
  .distinction b{color:var(--ink);}
  .ladder{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-top:22px;}
  .rung{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;gap:14px;background:var(--card2);border:1px solid var(--line);border-left:3px solid var(--amber);border-radius:8px;padding:11px 16px;}
  .rung b{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:16px;color:var(--ink);white-space:nowrap;}
  .rung span{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--dim);text-align:right;letter-spacing:.02em;}
  @media(max-width:600px){.rung{flex-direction:column;gap:3px;}.rung span{text-align:left;}}
  .segments{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin-top:20px;}
  @media(max-width:760px){.segments{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
  .seg{background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--card2));border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 15px;}
  .seg .tag{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--amber);margin-bottom:6px;}
  .seg p{font-size:13px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--dim);}
  .seg b{color:var(--ink);}
  .tam{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-top:20px;}
  .tam .t{background:rgba(232,163,61,.07);border:1px solid rgba(232,163,61,.3);border-radius:8px;padding:11px 16px;font-size:14px;color:var(--dim);line-height:1.45;}
  .tam .t b{color:var(--amber);}
  .tam .t .mini{color:var(--faint);font-size:12px;font-style:italic;}
  .playbook{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:12px;margin-top:22px;}
  @media(max-width:760px){.playbook{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
  .playbook .step{background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--card2));border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:15px 16px;}
  .playbook .step .tag{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:7px;}
  .playbook .step h3{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:600;font-size:17px;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:6px;}
  .playbook .step p{font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--dim);}
  .impactgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin-top:20px;}
  @media(max-width:760px){.impactgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
  .imp{background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--card2));border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 15px;}
  .imp .tag{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:6px;}
  .imp p{font-size:13px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--dim);}
.diagram-wrap{margin:4px auto;display:flex;justify-content:center;background:rgba(10,13,18,.5);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:6px;box-shadow:0 0 30px -16px rgba(230,160,66,.4);transition:box-shadow .4s,border-color .4s;transform-origin:center;position:relative;overflow:visible;}
  .diagram-wrap svg{width:100%;height:auto;max-height:60vh;transition:transform .45s cubic-bezier(.34,1.1,.64,1);transform-origin:center;will-change:transform;}
  .diagram-wrap:hover{box-shadow:0 0 70px -8px rgba(230,160,66,.6);border-color:rgba(230,160,66,.6);z-index:30;}
  .diagram-wrap:hover svg{transform:scale(1.3);}
  #lightbox{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:60;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(4,6,9,.93);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);cursor:zoom-out;padding:24px;}
  #lightbox.open{display:flex;animation:lbfade .25s ease;}
  @keyframes lbfade{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
  #lightbox svg{width:auto;height:auto;max-width:96vw;max-height:92vh;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 60px rgba(230,160,66,.25));}
  #lightbox .lbclose{position:absolute;top:20px;right:26px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;color:var(--amber);border:1px solid rgba(230,160,66,.5);border-radius:8px;padding:7px 13px;cursor:pointer;background:rgba(10,13,18,.7);}
  #lightbox .lbhint{position:absolute;bottom:22px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:.06em;}
  /* ---- comprehension quiz ---- */
  .quizbox{margin-top:22px;background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--card2));border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;padding:22px 24px;box-shadow:0 0 40px -20px rgba(230,160,66,.4);transition:transform .35s cubic-bezier(.34,1.1,.64,1),box-shadow .35s,border-color .35s;transform-origin:center;}
  .quizbox:hover{transform:scale(1.04);box-shadow:0 0 60px -14px rgba(230,160,66,.6);border-color:rgba(230,160,66,.5);}
  .popquiz{max-width:760px;}
  .quizbox.pop{animation:quizpop .55s cubic-bezier(.2,1.1,.5,1) both;}
  @keyframes quizpop{0%{transform:scale(.92);opacity:.4;box-shadow:0 0 0 rgba(230,160,66,0);}60%{transform:scale(1.03);}100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;box-shadow:0 0 60px -14px rgba(230,160,66,.6);}}
  .quiz-pophint{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--teal);letter-spacing:.05em;opacity:.85;}
  /* ---- interactive glossary ---- */
  .gloss{background:rgba(95,211,160,.16);color:var(--phosphor);cursor:help;border-radius:3px;padding:0 3px;box-decoration-break:clone;-webkit-box-decoration-break:clone;transition:background .2s,color .2s;}
  .gloss:hover{background:rgba(95,211,160,.32);color:#d6ffe9;}
  .glosstip{position:fixed;z-index:60;max-width:340px;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0d1117,#0a0d12);border:1px solid rgba(70,200,192,.45);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;box-shadow:0 16px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,.8),0 0 30px -12px rgba(70,200,192,.5);opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transform:translateY(4px);transition:opacity .18s,transform .18s,visibility .18s;pointer-events:none;}
  .glosstip.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;transform:translateY(0);pointer-events:auto;}
  .glosstip .gt-term{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin-bottom:6px;}
  .glosstip .gt-def{font-size:14px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:8px;}
  .glosstip .gt-rel{font-size:12.5px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--dim);}
  .glosstip .gt-rel span{color:var(--amber);font-weight:600;}
  .glosstip .gt-askai{margin-top:11px;width:100%;background:rgba(70,200,192,.16);border:1px solid rgba(70,200,192,.5);
    color:var(--teal);border-radius:9px;padding:8px 12px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;
    letter-spacing:.03em;transition:background .15s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px;}
  .glosstip .gt-askai:hover{background:rgba(70,200,192,.3);}
  .glosstip .gt-askai:active{transform:scale(.98);}
  @media (max-width:600px){ .glosstip{max-width:78vw;} }
  /* ---- per-agent dossier list ---- */
  .agentlist{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;margin-top:12px;}
  .agentrow{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--card2));border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 13px;transition:border-color .25s,transform .2s;}
  .agentrow:hover{border-color:rgba(230,160,66,.45);transform:translateX(3px);}
  .agentrow .anum{flex:0 0 30px;height:30px;display:grid;place-items:center;border:1px solid var(--amber);border-radius:50%;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--amber);margin-top:1px;}
  .agentrow .abody{flex:1;min-width:0;}
  .agentrow .aname{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:15.5px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .agentrow .amodel{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10.5px;letter-spacing:.05em;color:var(--teal);text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:400;}
  .agentrow .awhat{font-size:12.5px;line-height:1.42;color:var(--dim);margin-top:2px;}
  .agentrow .awhat b{color:var(--ink);font-weight:600;}
  @media (max-width:600px){
    .agentrow{padding:11px 12px;gap:10px;}
    .agentrow .anum{flex-basis:26px;height:26px;font-size:11px;}
    .agentrow .aname{font-size:15.5px;}
    .agentrow .awhat{font-size:12.5px;}
  }
  .quiz-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim);margin-bottom:14px;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .quiz-head .quiz-type{color:var(--teal);}
  .quiz-head .quiz-score{color:var(--amber);}
  .quiz-q{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:22px;line-height:1.3;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:18px;}
  .quiz-opts{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}
  .quiz-opt{text-align:left;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:13px 16px;font-size:15px;color:var(--ink);cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--sans);transition:border-color .2s,background .2s,transform .1s;}
  .quiz-opt:hover:not(:disabled){border-color:rgba(230,160,66,.5);transform:translateX(3px);}
  .quiz-opt:disabled{cursor:default;opacity:.75;}
  .quiz-opt.correct{border-color:var(--phosphor);background:rgba(95,211,160,.12);color:var(--phosphor);opacity:1;font-weight:600;}
  .quiz-opt.wrong{border-color:var(--oxblood);background:rgba(143,47,40,.15);color:#e89a92;}
  .quiz-sa{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .quiz-sa input{flex:1;min-width:220px;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:13px 16px;font-size:15px;color:var(--ink);font-family:var(--sans);}
  .quiz-sa input:focus{outline:none;border-color:rgba(230,160,66,.6);}
  .quiz-sa input.correct{border-color:var(--phosphor);background:rgba(95,211,160,.1);}
  .quiz-sa input.wrong{border-color:var(--oxblood);background:rgba(143,47,40,.12);}
  .quiz-submit,.quiz-next,.quiz-result button{background:rgba(230,160,66,.12);border:1px solid rgba(230,160,66,.5);color:var(--amber);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 20px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.05em;cursor:pointer;transition:box-shadow .25s,background .2s;}
  .quiz-submit:hover,.quiz-next:hover,.quiz-result button:hover{box-shadow:0 0 22px -6px rgba(230,160,66,.7);background:rgba(230,160,66,.2);}
  .quiz-fb{margin-top:16px;font-size:14.5px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--dim);}
  .quiz-fb.ok{color:#bde6cf;} .quiz-fb.no{color:#e8b6b0;}
  .quiz-fb b{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.06em;display:inline-block;margin-right:4px;}
  .quiz-fb.ok b{color:var(--phosphor);} .quiz-fb.no b{color:#e89a92;}
  .quiz-nav{margin-top:18px;}
  .quiz-result{text-align:center;padding:18px 0;}
  .quiz-result-score{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:48px;color:var(--amber);text-shadow:0 0 26px rgba(230,160,66,.35);}
  .quiz-result-pct{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:16px;color:var(--teal);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:.08em;}
  .quiz-result-verdict{margin:14px 0 20px;font-size:16px;color:var(--dim);}
  .quiz-result-lvl{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--dim);margin:-8px 0 18px;font-family:var(--mono);letter-spacing:.03em;}
  .quiz-head .quiz-lvl{color:var(--amber);border:1px solid rgba(230,160,66,.4);border-radius:999px;padding:2px 9px;font-size:10px;white-space:nowrap;}
  .quiz-fb.partial{color:#f0d9a8;} .quiz-fb.partial b{color:var(--amber);}
  .quiz-fb.grading{color:var(--teal);}
  .quiz-spin{display:inline-block;width:12px;height:12px;border:2px solid rgba(70,200,192,.3);border-top-color:var(--teal);border-radius:50%;animation:qspin .7s linear infinite;vertical-align:-2px;margin-right:4px;}
  @keyframes qspin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
  .quiz-sa{flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;}
  .quiz-sa textarea{width:100%;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:13px 16px;font-size:15px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--ink);font-family:var(--sans);resize:vertical;min-height:74px;box-sizing:border-box;}
  .quiz-sa textarea:focus{outline:none;border-color:rgba(230,160,66,.6);}
  .quiz-sa textarea.correct{border-color:var(--phosphor);background:rgba(95,211,160,.08);}
  .quiz-sa textarea.partial{border-color:var(--amber);background:rgba(230,160,66,.08);}
  .quiz-sa textarea.wrong{border-color:var(--oxblood);background:rgba(143,47,40,.1);}
  .quiz-sa .quiz-submit{align-self:flex-start;margin-top:10px;}
  .quiz-sahint{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--dim);margin-top:7px;font-family:var(--mono);letter-spacing:.02em;}
  .quiz-model{margin-top:10px;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:9px;background:rgba(70,200,192,.08);border:1px solid rgba(70,200,192,.3);font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--ink);}
  .quiz-model b{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--teal);letter-spacing:.05em;}
  .quiz-skip{background:transparent;border-color:var(--line);color:var(--dim);margin-left:8px;}
  /* comprehension-level picker */
  .lvl-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;margin:6px 0 4px;}
  .lvl-opt{text-align:left;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:11px;padding:12px 15px;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s,background .2s,transform .1s;color:var(--ink);font-family:var(--sans);width:100%;}
  .lvl-opt:hover{border-color:rgba(230,160,66,.5);transform:translateX(3px);}
  .lvl-opt.sel{border-color:var(--amber);background:rgba(230,160,66,.12);box-shadow:0 0 18px -8px rgba(230,160,66,.6);}
  .lvl-opt .lvl-name{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.05em;color:var(--amber);text-transform:uppercase;}
  .lvl-opt .lvl-blurb{font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--dim);margin-top:3px;}
  .lvl-opt.sel .lvl-blurb{color:var(--ink);}
  #levelBtn b{color:var(--amber);}
    .throughline{margin-top:20px;padding:16px 20px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(232,163,61,.1);border:1px solid rgba(232,163,61,.4);font-family:var(--serif);font-size:18px;line-height:1.4;color:var(--ink);text-align:center;}
  .anim{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px);}
  .active .anim{animation:rise .6s forwards;}
  .active .anim:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.06s}
  .active .anim:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.12s}
  .active .anim:nth-child(4){animation-delay:.18s}
  .active .anim:nth-child(5){animation-delay:.24s}
  @keyframes rise{to{opacity:1;transform:none}}

  /* ============ TECH-NOIR THEME (restrained) ============ */
  /* atmospheric overlay: vignette + faint scanlines, behind everything, no interaction cost */
  body::before{
    content:"";position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;
    background:
      repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(255,255,255,.012) 0px, rgba(255,255,255,.012) 1px, transparent 1px, transparent 3px),
      radial-gradient(120% 120% at 50% 50%, transparent 55%, rgba(0,0,0,.55) 100%);
    mix-blend-mode:soft-light;opacity:.6;
  }
  #deck{z-index:1;} #nav{z-index:20;} #tools{z-index:25;}

  /* Dune-weight, monolithic display type with a faint sodium glow */
  h1{letter-spacing:-.03em;text-shadow:0 0 38px rgba(230,160,66,.18);}
  h2.head{letter-spacing:-.02em;text-shadow:0 0 26px rgba(230,160,66,.12);}
  .eyebrow{color:var(--amber);text-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(230,160,66,.35);}
  .eyebrow .num{border-color:rgba(230,160,66,.6);box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(230,160,66,.25),inset 0 0 8px rgba(230,160,66,.12);}
  .eyebrow .bar{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--amber),transparent);}
  .kicker{color:var(--teal);text-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(70,200,192,.4);}

  /* cards: colder glass, sharper edge-light, deeper shadow (DC chiaroscuro) */
  .card,.agrp,.seg,.imp,.playbook .step,.vtx,.reflist a,.layer{
    background:linear-gradient(158deg, rgba(21,26,35,.92), rgba(10,13,18,.92));
    border-color:var(--line);
    box-shadow:0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.03) inset, 0 18px 40px -24px rgba(0,0,0,.9);
  }
  .card:hover,.seg:hover,.agrp:hover{border-color:rgba(230,160,66,.4);}

  /* accent glows on the thematic elements */
  .stat{text-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(230,160,66,.3);}
  .layer.l1{box-shadow:0 0 30px -16px rgba(143,47,40,.7);}
  .layer.l2{box-shadow:0 0 30px -16px rgba(230,160,66,.55);}
  .layer.l3{box-shadow:0 0 30px -16px rgba(70,200,192,.5);}
  .hierarchy .h{background:rgba(12,15,20,.8);box-shadow:0 0 10px -4px rgba(230,160,66,.4) inset;}
  .hierarchy .arrow{color:var(--amber);text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(230,160,66,.6);}
  .mode.def{box-shadow:0 0 22px -10px rgba(230,160,66,.6);}
  .mode.opt{box-shadow:0 0 22px -10px rgba(70,200,192,.55);}
  .rule{box-shadow:0 0 26px -12px rgba(143,47,40,.7);text-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(230,160,66,.15);}
  .throughline{box-shadow:0 0 30px -14px rgba(230,160,66,.5);text-shadow:0 0 18px rgba(230,160,66,.18);}

  /* buttons: terminal-style with phosphor edge */
  .deepbtn{box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(230,160,66,.15),0 0 18px -8px rgba(230,160,66,.5);}
  .deepbtn:hover{box-shadow:0 0 24px -6px rgba(255,201,119,.7);}
  .toolbtn:hover{box-shadow:0 0 16px -6px rgba(230,160,66,.6);}
  .btn{box-shadow:0 0 22px -8px rgba(230,160,66,.6);}

  /* progress bar glows like a HUD readout */
  .progress > i{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--oxblood),var(--amber));box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(230,160,66,.7);}
  .counter{color:var(--teal);text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(70,200,192,.35);}

  /* mono labels pick up the phosphor-terminal feel */
  .card .ic,.card .k,.agrp .tag,.seg .tag,.imp .tag,.playbook .step .tag,
  .layer .tag,.callout .lab,.distinction .lab,.pcallout .l{
    text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(230,160,66,.2);
  }

  /* the secure-tunnel / rule banners get the oxblood DC shadow weight */
  .callout.oxblood{box-shadow:0 0 28px -16px rgba(143,47,40,.6);}

  /* parchment deep-dive stays warm and highly legible — just a touch more contrast and an aged edge */
  #paper{box-shadow:inset 0 0 160px -40px rgba(90,60,20,.35);}
  #paper h1{text-shadow:none;}
  #paper h3{text-shadow:none;}

  /* QR card: subtle amber frame so it reads as a HUD element */
  .qrbox{box-shadow:0 0 30px -10px rgba(230,160,66,.4);}

  /* ============ MOBILE / SMARTPHONE LAYER ============ */
  @media (max-width:600px){
    .slide{padding:3.2vh 5vw 9vh;align-items:flex-start;}
    .wrap{width:100%;}
    .eyebrow{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.12em;gap:9px;margin-bottom:14px;}
    .eyebrow .num{width:24px;height:24px;}
    .eyebrow .bar{flex-basis:26px;}
    h1{font-size:clamp(30px,8.5vw,40px);margin-bottom:14px;}
    h2.head{font-size:clamp(24px,7vw,34px);margin-bottom:12px;}
    .sub{font-size:16px;max-width:100%;}
    .lede{font-size:15.5px;max-width:100%;margin-bottom:18px;}
    .grid{gap:11px;margin-top:16px;}
    .card{padding:13px 15px;}
    .twocol{gap:11px;margin-top:14px;}
    .twocol .col{padding:13px 15px;}
    .modes{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    /* nav + tools: bigger, thumb-friendly, out of the way */
    #tools{top:auto;bottom:8px;left:auto;right:12px;flex-direction:column-reverse;align-items:flex-end;gap:6px;}
    #tools button,#tools .toolbtn{font-size:11px;padding:7px 10px;}
    #nav{bottom:8px;}
    #nav button{width:42px;height:42px;}
    #counter{font-size:12px;}
    /* diagrams: don't hover-zoom on touch; show a tap hint instead */
    .diagram-wrap{cursor:zoom-in;}
    .diagram-wrap:hover svg{transform:none;}
    .diagram-wrap svg{max-height:48vh;}
    .diagram-wrap::after{content:"\2922 tap to enlarge";position:absolute;top:6px;right:10px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--amber);opacity:.8;pointer-events:none;text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(0,0,0,.8);}
    /* quiz: comfortable tap targets, no hover-scale on touch */
    .quizbox{padding:16px 15px;margin-top:14px;}
    .quizbox:hover{transform:none;}
    .quiz-q{font-size:18px;}
    .quiz-opt{padding:14px 14px;font-size:15px;}
    .quiz-head{font-size:10px;gap:8px;}
    .quiz-sa input{min-width:0;width:100%;}
    /* deep-dive paper panel full-width on phone */
    .deepbtn{width:100%;}
    /* fullscreen diagram lightbox: allow pinch-zoom scroll */
    #lightbox{padding:10px;overflow:auto;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;}
    #lightbox .lbclose{top:10px;right:12px;font-size:12px;}
  }
  /* on any touch device, suppress hover-scale so tap is the interaction */
  @media (hover:none){
    .diagram-wrap:hover svg{transform:none;}
    .quizbox:hover{transform:none;}
  }

  /* ============ TABLET / iPad LAYER (601px–1180px) ============ */
  /* The phone rules stop at 600px and desktop assumes a tall, wide window.
     iPad portrait (~768–834px) and especially iPad LANDSCAPE (~1024–1194px,
     but SHORT — ~744–834px tall) fall through the gap: dense grids stay
     multi-column and the fixed 6vh/7vw padding eats the limited height, so
     content clips and the deep-dive panel reads too wide. This layer fixes
     both the medium width band and the short-height landscape case. */
  @media (min-width:601px) and (max-width:1180px){
    .slide{padding:4.5vh 5.5vw 8vh;align-items:flex-start;}
    .wrap, .wrap.wide{width:100%;max-width:880px;margin:0 auto;}
    h1{font-size:clamp(34px,6vw,60px);}
    h2.head{font-size:clamp(28px,5vw,46px);}
    .sub{max-width:60ch;}
    .lede{max-width:68ch;}
    /* three-up grids become two-up so cards keep a readable width */
    .g3{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
    .modes{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
    .ucgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);}
    /* deep-dive parchment: comfortable measure, not edge-to-edge */
    .paper-inner{max-width:680px;padding:56px 32px 120px;}
    /* diagrams: cap height so a wide SVG can't push the slide off-screen */
    .diagram-wrap svg{max-height:56vh;}
  }

  /* SHORT-HEIGHT LANDSCAPE (the classic "iPad turned sideways" complaint):
     wide enough to look like desktop, but too short for 6vh padding + tall
     content. Tighten vertical rhythm and let dense grids breathe sideways. */
  @media (min-width:601px) and (max-height:820px) and (orientation:landscape){
    .slide{padding:3vh 5vw 7vh;align-items:flex-start;overflow-y:auto;}
    h1{font-size:clamp(30px,5vw,52px);margin-bottom:12px;}
    h2.head{font-size:clamp(24px,4vw,40px);margin-bottom:12px;}
    .lede{margin-bottom:16px;}
    .grid{margin-top:16px;gap:12px;}
    /* landscape is wide, so keep 3-up where it was but shrink card padding */
    .card{padding:14px 16px;}
    .ucgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);}
    .diagram-wrap svg{max-height:62vh;}
    /* keep the deep-dive readable and scrollable within the short viewport */
    .paper-inner{padding:40px 36px 96px;max-width:720px;}
    #paper h1{font-size:clamp(26px,3.6vw,40px);margin-bottom:16px;}
  }

  /* iPad PORTRAIT specifically (narrowish + tall): single-column the densest
     grids so multi-card rows don't cramp, but keep generous type. */
  @media (min-width:601px) and (max-width:840px) and (orientation:portrait){
    .g2,.g3{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .modes{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .ucgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
    .twocol{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  }

  /* ---- feedback button + modal ---- */
  .fb-mic-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin:6px 0 12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .fb-mic{white-space:nowrap;}
  .fb-text{width:100%;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;
    font-size:15px;color:var(--ink);font-family:var(--sans);line-height:1.5;resize:vertical;min-height:96px;}
  .fb-text:focus{outline:none;border-color:rgba(230,160,66,.6);}
  .fb-actions{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .quality-score{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin:8px 0 14px;padding:14px;border:1px solid rgba(70,200,192,.35);border-radius:12px;background:rgba(70,200,192,.1);}
  .quality-score strong{font-family:var(--serif);font-size:46px;line-height:1;color:var(--teal);}
  .quality-score span{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--dim);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.05em;}
  .quality-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:8px;margin:12px 0;}
  .quality-metric{display:grid;gap:4px;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.025);}
  .quality-metric span{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim);}
  .quality-metric strong{font-size:19px;color:var(--ink);}
  .quality-note{margin:12px 0;padding:11px 12px;border-radius:10px;background:rgba(230,160,66,.09);border:1px solid rgba(230,160,66,.25);color:var(--dim);line-height:1.45;}
  .quality-list{margin:8px 0 0 18px;color:var(--dim);line-height:1.45;}
  .quality-list li{margin-bottom:7px;}
  .chat-inrow{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin-top:14px;}
  .chat-inrow .chatin{flex:1;margin-top:0;}
  .chat-mic{flex:0 0 auto;padding:10px 13px;font-size:16px;line-height:1;}
  .chat-mic:active{transform:scale(.95);}
  .paper-fb{margin:32px 0 8px;padding-top:20px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);}
  .paper-fb .deepbtn{margin:0;}
  /* ---- wide wrap for comparison + use-cases ---- */
  .wrap.wide{max-width:1180px;}
  /* ---- use-case grid ---- */
  .ucgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:7px;margin:6px 0 10px;}
  .uccard{background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--card2));border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 11px;}
  .uccard .ucname{font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.2;}
  .uccard .uclaw{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.03em;color:var(--amber);margin:2px 0 4px;text-transform:uppercase;}
  .uccard .ucdesc{font-size:11px;line-height:1.35;color:var(--dim);}
  @media (max-width:1000px){ .ucgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);} }
  @media (max-width:760px){ .ucgrid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);} }
  @media (max-width:520px){ .ucgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
  /* ---- comparison heat map ---- */
  .heatmap{margin:10px 0 14px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;}
  .hmrow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);}
  .hmrow.hm4{grid-template-columns:1.2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;}
  .hm4 .hmcell{min-height:34px;padding:6px 10px;font-size:11.5px;}
  .hm4 .hmdim{padding:6px 11px;font-size:11.5px;}
  .hm4 .hmcol{padding:7px 10px !important;}
  .hmrow.hm6{grid-template-columns:1.3fr repeat(6,1fr);}
  .hmrow.hm6 .hmcell,.hmrow.hm6 .hmcol{font-size:11px;padding:8px 7px;}
  .hmrow.hm6 .hmdim{font-size:11.5px;}
  .hmrow:last-child{border-bottom:0;}
  .hmrow.hmhead{background:rgba(230,160,66,.07);}
  .hmrow.hmhead .hmcol{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.05em;color:var(--amber);padding:10px 12px;text-align:center;text-transform:uppercase;}
  .hmdim{padding:10px 13px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);display:flex;align-items:center;border-right:1px solid var(--line);background:rgba(255,255,255,.015);}
  .hmcell{border:0;border-right:1px solid var(--line);padding:10px 12px;cursor:pointer;text-align:center;font-family:var(--sans);
    color:var(--ink);font-size:12.5px;transition:filter .15s,transform .1s;min-height:42px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
  .hmcell:last-child{border-right:0;}
  .hmcell:hover{filter:brightness(1.25);}
  .hmcell:active{transform:scale(.98);}
  .hmcell .hmv{line-height:1.25;}
  .tone-good{background:rgba(95,211,160,.16);} .tone-good:hover{background:rgba(95,211,160,.26);}
  .tone-mid{background:rgba(230,160,66,.14);} .tone-mid:hover{background:rgba(230,160,66,.24);}
  .tone-bad{background:rgba(143,47,40,.20);} .tone-bad:hover{background:rgba(143,47,40,.32);}
  .tone-crit{background:rgba(207,60,50,.34);color:#ffd9d4;} .tone-crit:hover{background:rgba(207,60,50,.5);}
  .tone-hi{background:rgba(70,140,200,.20);} .tone-hi:hover{background:rgba(70,140,200,.3);}
  .tone-mid2{background:rgba(70,140,200,.12);}
  .tone-lo{background:rgba(70,140,200,.06);} .tone-lo:hover{background:rgba(70,140,200,.14);}
  /* ---- interactive world map ---- */
  .worldmap{margin:8px 0 10px;}
  .worldmap svg{width:100%;height:auto;display:block;}
  .worldmap{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0a0e13,#070a0e);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;padding:10px;}
  .hmzone{cursor:pointer;stroke:rgba(8,12,16,.9);stroke-width:0.5;transition:filter .15s,stroke .15s;}
  .hmzone:hover{filter:brightness(1.4) saturate(1.2);stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.6);stroke-width:0.8;}
  .hmzone.tone-vh{fill:#5fd3a0;} .hmzone.tone-hi{fill:#3f7fb8;} .hmzone.tone-mid{fill:#2c4a63;}
  .hmzlabel{fill:#f0f4f8;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;text-anchor:middle;pointer-events:none;dominant-baseline:middle;paint-order:stroke;stroke:#070a0e;stroke-width:3px;}
  .maplegend{display:flex;gap:18px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;margin-top:6px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--dim);}
  .maplegend i.lg{display:inline-block;width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:3px;margin-right:5px;vertical-align:middle;}
  .maplegend .tone-vh{background:rgba(95,211,160,.55);} .maplegend .tone-hi{background:rgba(70,140,200,.5);} .maplegend .tone-mid{background:rgba(70,140,200,.24);}
  /* ---- source citation icon + bundled source overlay ---- */
  .cite{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--mono);
    font-size:9.5px;line-height:1;color:var(--teal);background:rgba(70,200,192,.14);border:1px solid rgba(70,200,192,.4);
    border-radius:4px;padding:1px 4px;margin:0 2px;vertical-align:super;transition:background .15s,transform .1s;user-select:none;}
  .cite:hover{background:rgba(70,200,192,.3);}
  .cite:active{transform:scale(.92);}
  #srcpaper{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--paper);color:var(--paper-ink);z-index:55;
    transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform .45s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);overflow-y:auto;}
  #srcpaper.open{transform:none;}
  #srcpaper h1{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:900;font-size:clamp(24px,4vw,38px);color:var(--paper-ink);margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.12;}
  #srcpaper h3{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:600;font-size:21px;margin:24px 0 8px;color:#403a2e;}
  #srcpaper p{font-size:16px;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:13px;}
  #srcpaper b{color:#2a2620;}
  #srcpaper .src-meta{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12.5px;color:#7a6f56;border-bottom:1px solid var(--paper-line);padding-bottom:16px;margin-bottom:24px;}
  .src-sec{scroll-margin-top:40px;border-radius:8px;padding:6px 12px;margin:0 -12px;transition:background .4s;}
  .src-sec.src-hl{background:rgba(70,200,192,.14);}
  /* ---- end-of-class knowledge base report ---- */
  .source-report .lede{max-width:74ch;}
  .source-report-list{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:12px;margin:22px 0;}
  .source-report-card{display:grid;gap:8px;min-width:0;background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--card),var(--card2));
    border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:15px 16px;}
  .source-report-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:10px;align-items:start;}
  .source-report-head > span{display:inline-grid;place-items:center;min-width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:999px;
    border:1px solid rgba(230,160,66,.5);color:var(--amber);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;}
  .source-report-head h3{margin:0;font-family:var(--serif);font-size:18px;line-height:1.2;color:var(--ink);overflow-wrap:anywhere;}
  .source-report-head a{color:var(--ink);text-decoration-color:rgba(70,200,192,.55);text-underline-offset:3px;}
  .source-report-card p{font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--dim);}
  .source-report-card strong{color:var(--ink);}
  .source-rubric{margin-top:10px;padding:15px 18px;border:1px solid rgba(230,160,66,.35);border-radius:12px;
    background:rgba(230,160,66,.08);color:var(--dim);}
  .source-rubric summary{cursor:pointer;color:var(--amber);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;}
  .source-rubric ol{margin:12px 0 0 20px;}
  .source-rubric li{font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.5;margin-bottom:8px;}
  .source-rubric strong{color:var(--ink);}
  .source-suggest-btn{margin-top:14px;}
  /* ---- interactive tile + detail popup ---- */
  .tile-interactive{cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:transform .14s,border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s;}
  .tile-interactive:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);border-color:rgba(70,200,192,.55);box-shadow:0 10px 30px -14px rgba(0,0,0,.7),0 0 22px -10px rgba(70,200,192,.5);}
  .tile-interactive::after{content:"+";position:absolute;top:8px;right:11px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:14px;color:var(--teal);opacity:.5;transition:opacity .2s;}
  .tile-interactive:hover::after{opacity:1;}
  .tile-panel{max-width:560px;}
  .tile-eyebrow{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--amber);margin-bottom:8px;}
  .tile-body{font-size:15px;line-height:1.62;color:var(--ink);margin:6px 0 16px;}
  .tile-links{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:14px;}
  .tilelink{background:rgba(70,200,192,.13);border:1px solid rgba(70,200,192,.45);color:var(--teal);
    border-radius:9px;padding:10px 14px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12.5px;letter-spacing:.03em;text-align:left;transition:background .15s;}
  .tilelink:hover{background:rgba(70,200,192,.24);}
  .tilelink.alt{background:rgba(230,160,66,.1);border-color:rgba(230,160,66,.4);color:var(--amber);}
  .tilelink.alt:hover{background:rgba(230,160,66,.2);}
  /* ---- SVG diagram interactive hotspots ---- */
  .svghot{fill:transparent;cursor:pointer;stroke:transparent;stroke-width:2;transition:fill .15s,stroke .15s;}
  .svghot:hover{fill:rgba(70,200,192,.12);stroke:rgba(70,200,192,.7);}
  /* ---- transient hover panel for tiles (closes on mouse-out) ---- */
  .tile-hover{position:fixed;z-index:58;max-width:360px;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0d1117,#0a0d12);
    border:1px solid rgba(70,200,192,.45);border-radius:12px;padding:13px 15px;
    box-shadow:0 16px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,.8),0 0 28px -12px rgba(70,200,192,.45);
    opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transform:translateY(4px);transition:opacity .15s,transform .15s,visibility .15s;pointer-events:none;}
  .tile-hover.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;transform:translateY(0);pointer-events:auto;}
  .tile-hover .th-law{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.05em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--amber);margin-bottom:5px;}
  .tile-hover .th-title{font-family:var(--serif);font-weight:700;font-size:16px;color:var(--ink);margin-bottom:6px;line-height:1.2;}
  .tile-hover .th-body{font-size:13px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--dim);}
  .tile-hover .th-hint{margin-top:9px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.04em;color:var(--teal);opacity:.85;}
  @media (max-width:600px){ .tile-hover{max-width:80vw;} }
  @media (max-width:600px){ .hmzlabel{font-size:18px;} }
  @media (max-width:600px){ .hmrow{grid-template-columns:1fr;} .hmrow.hmhead{display:none;}
    .hmdim{border-right:0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);font-size:13px;background:rgba(230,160,66,.06);}
    .hmcell{border-right:0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(34,40,49,.5);justify-content:flex-start;} }
  @media (max-width:600px){ }
  /* ---- scroll-down indicator ---- */
  #scrollcue{position:fixed;left:50%;bottom:60px;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(8px);z-index:23;
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:1px;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;
    transition:opacity .3s,transform .3s;}
  #scrollcue.show{opacity:.9;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);animation:scuebob 1.8s ease-in-out infinite;}
  #scrollcue .sc-arrow{font-size:22px;line-height:1;color:var(--teal);text-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(70,200,192,.7);}
  #scrollcue .sc-label{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);opacity:.8;}
  @keyframes scuebob{0%,100%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(5px);}}
  @media (max-width:600px){ #scrollcue{bottom:54px;} }
  /* ---- select-any-text -> Ask Bernard menu ---- */
  #selAsk{position:fixed;z-index:62;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0d1117,#0a0d12);border:1px solid rgba(70,200,192,.5);
    border-radius:12px;padding:10px 11px;box-shadow:0 18px 54px -14px rgba(0,0,0,.85),0 0 28px -12px rgba(70,200,192,.5);
    opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transform:translateY(5px);transition:opacity .15s,transform .15s,visibility .15s;max-width:300px;}
  #selAsk.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;transform:translateY(0);}
  #selAsk .sel-head{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--dim);margin-bottom:8px;line-height:1.3;}
  #selAsk #selAskText{color:var(--teal);}
  #selAsk .sel-opts{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px;}
  #selAsk .sel-opt{background:rgba(70,200,192,.13);border:1px solid rgba(70,200,192,.4);color:var(--teal);
    border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;cursor:pointer;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11.5px;text-align:left;transition:background .14s;white-space:nowrap;}
  #selAsk .sel-opt:hover{background:rgba(70,200,192,.27);}
  #selAsk .sel-opt:active{transform:scale(.97);}
  @media (max-width:600px){ #selAsk .sel-opts{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;} #selAsk{max-width:84vw;} }
  @media (max-width:760px){.source-report-list{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}

  /* final mobile control pass: keep tools, nav, listen bar, and modals from overlapping */
  @media (max-width:600px){
    .slide{padding:76px 5vw 92px;}
    #tools{top:8px;right:8px;left:8px;bottom:auto;flex-direction:row;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:flex-end;pointer-events:none;}
    #tools .toolbtn{pointer-events:auto;white-space:normal;}
    #tools .tools-toggle{flex:0 0 auto;}
    #tools .tools-items{width:min(360px,calc(100vw - 16px));align-items:stretch;}
    #tools.open .tools-items{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:6px;}
    #tools.open{align-items:start;}
    #tools button,#tools .toolbtn{min-height:38px;font-size:10.5px;padding:8px 9px;}
    #nav{bottom:0;height:58px;padding:0 10px calc(env(safe-area-inset-bottom));background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(8,10,14,.96),rgba(8,10,14,.6));}
    #nav button{width:40px;height:40px;}
    .progress{margin:0 10px;}
    #scrollcue{bottom:64px;}
    #listenBar{left:8px;right:8px;bottom:66px;max-width:none;transform:translateY(18px);gap:8px;}
    #listenBar.on{transform:translateY(0);}
    #listenBar .lb-btns{gap:6px;}
    .lb-btn{padding:8px 9px;}
    .modal{align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;padding:70px 10px 72px;}
    .panel{width:100%;max-height:calc(100dvh - 148px);padding:18px;border-radius:14px;}
    .chat-inrow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;}
    .source-report-head{grid-template-columns:auto minmax(0,1fr);}
    .source-report-head .cite{grid-column:1 / -1;justify-self:start;}
  }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){ body::before{opacity:.4;} }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="tools">
  <button class="toolbtn tools-toggle" id="toolsToggle" onclick="toggleTools()" aria-label="Open class menu">☰ Menu</button>
  <div class="tools-items" id="toolsItems">
    <button class="toolbtn tools-live" data-modal="poll" id="pollBtn" style="display:none">▦ Poll</button>
    <button class="toolbtn tools-live" data-modal="words" id="wordsBtn" style="display:none">☁ Word cloud</button>
    <button class="toolbtn" onclick="openListen()" id="listenToolBtn">▶ Listen</button>
    <button class="toolbtn" onclick="openLevel()" id="levelBtn">◎ Level</button>
    <button class="toolbtn" onclick="openFeedback()" id="fbToolBtn">✎ Feedback</button>
    <button class="toolbtn" data-modal="quality">▣ Quality</button>
    <button class="toolbtn" data-modal="chat">✦ Ask Bernard</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="listenBar">
  <span id="listenStatus">Starting…</span>
  <div class="lb-btns">
    <button id="lbPlay" class="lb-btn" onclick="listenPlayPause()" title="Play / pause">⏸</button>
    <button id="lbAsk" class="lb-btn lb-ask" onclick="listenAsk()" title="Ask Bernard out loud">🎤 Ask Bernard</button>
    <button id="lbStop" class="lb-btn" onclick="listenStop()" title="Stop listening">⏹</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="scrollcue" aria-hidden="true"><span class="sc-arrow">⌄</span><span class="sc-label">more below</span></div>

<div id="selAsk" role="menu" aria-label="Ask Bernard about the selected text">
  <div class="sel-head">Ask Bernard about “<span id="selAskText"></span>”</div>
  <div class="sel-opts">
    <button class="sel-opt" data-kind="definition">📖 Definition</button>
    <button class="sel-opt" data-kind="context">🧭 Context</button>
    <button class="sel-opt" data-kind="relevance">🎯 Relevance</button>
    <button class="sel-opt" data-kind="general">💬 General question</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="deck"></div>

<div id="nav">
  <div class="progress"><i id="bar"></i></div>
  <span class="counter" id="counter">1 / 17</span>
  <div class="navarrows">
    <button class="navbtn" id="prev" aria-label="Previous slide">‹</button>
    <button class="navbtn" id="next" aria-label="Next slide">›</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="paper"><button class="pclose" onclick="closePaper()">✕</button><div class="paper-inner" id="paperInner"></div></div>

<div id="srcpaper"><button class="pclose" onclick="closeSource()">✕</button><div class="paper-inner" id="srcInner"></div></div>

<div class="modal" id="tileModal">
  <div class="panel tile-panel">
    <div class="tile-eyebrow" id="tileLaw"></div>
    <h3 id="tileTitle">Detail</h3>
    <div class="tile-body" id="tileBody"></div>
    <div class="tile-links" id="tileLinks"></div>
    <button class="btn ghost" onclick="closeModal('tile')">Close</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- POLL MODAL -->
<div class="modal" id="pollModal">
  <div class="panel">
    <h3 id="pollQ">Poll</h3>
    <div class="desc" id="pollDesc"></div>
    <div id="pollOpts"></div>
    <div class="muted" id="pollMuted"></div>
    <button class="btn ghost" onclick="closeModal('poll')">Close</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FEEDBACK MODAL -->
<div class="modal" id="feedbackModal">
  <div class="panel">
    <h3>Feedback on this slide</h3>
    <div class="desc" id="fbSlideLabel"></div>
    <div class="fb-mic-row">
      <button class="btn fb-mic" id="fbMic" onclick="toggleDictation()">🎤 Start voice</button>

<script>
/* ============================================================================
   ENGINE — Introduction to Photosynthesis  ·  Master Class
   ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
   Renders SLIDES from content.js, drives navigation (arrows/swipe/keys),
   builds the title QR client-side from the current URL, opens the parchment
   deep-dive layer, and wires the three interactive backends:
     /api/poll  · /api/words  · /api/chat
   All three DEGRADE GRACEFULLY: if the backend is unreachable the deck still
   runs and shows this device's own input, so a network hiccup never kills the
   class.
   ============================================================================ */
(function(){
  "use strict";

  var SLIDES = window.SLIDES || [];
  var deck = document.getElementById("deck");
  var bar = document.getElementById("bar");
  var counter = document.getElementById("counter");
  var idx = 0;

  function setDeviceClass(){
    var width = window.innerWidth || document.documentElement.clientWidth || 0;
    var touch = ("ontouchstart" in window) || (navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0);
    var device = width <= 600 ? "phone" : width <= 1180 ? "tablet" : "desktop";
    document.documentElement.setAttribute("data-device", device);
    document.documentElement.classList.toggle("touch-device", !!touch);
  }
  setDeviceClass();
  window.addEventListener("resize", setDeviceClass, { passive:true });

  /* ---------- POLL / WORD definitions (deck-defined in content.js) ---------- */
  var POLLS = window.POLLS || {};
  var WORDS = window.WORDS || {};
  var CLASS_SLUG = (window.DECK_META && window.DECK_META.slug) ||
    String(window.CLASS_TITLE || "Introduction to Photosynthesis").toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,"-").replace(/^-+|-+$/g,"") ||
    "masterclass";

  /* ---------- COMPREHENSION LEVEL (1–5): scales quiz difficulty + AI grading ---------- */
  var COMP_LEVELS = [
    { n:1, key:"novice",        label:"Novice",                 blurb:"Just starting — basic recall and simple ideas." },
    { n:2, key:"conversational",label:"Conversational",         blurb:"Can hold a conversation about it in plain language." },
    { n:3, key:"proficient",    label:"Proficient",             blurb:"Uses key terms correctly and explains the causes." },
    { n:4, key:"mastery",       label:"Mastery",                blurb:"Handles nuance, multiple factors, and where historians disagree." },
    { n:5, key:"sme",           label:"Subject-Matter Expert · Teach", blurb:"Can teach it: clear, specific, with caveats and significance." }
  ];
  function compLevel(){
    var v = 2;
    try { v = parseInt(localStorage.getItem("tx_comp_level"),10) || 2; } catch(e){}
    return v<1 ? 1 : v>5 ? 5 : v;
  }
  function compMeta(n){ return COMP_LEVELS[(n||compLevel())-1] || COMP_LEVELS[1]; }
  window.compLevel = compLevel;
  function updateLevelBadge(){
    var m = compMeta();
    var lb = document.getElementById("levelBtn");
    if(lb){ lb.innerHTML = "\u25CE Level \u00B7 <b>Lv"+m.n+"</b>"; lb.setAttribute("title","Comprehension level: "+m.label+" — tap to change"); }
    Array.prototype.forEach.call(document.querySelectorAll("#levelModal .lvl-opt"), function(o){
      o.classList.toggle("sel", parseInt(o.getAttribute("data-lvl"),10)===m.n);
    });
  }
  window.updateLevelBadge = updateLevelBadge;
  window.openLevel = function(){
    var mod = document.getElementById("levelModal");
    if(mod){ mod.classList.add("open"); updateLevelBadge(); }
  };
  window.setCompLevel = function(n){
    n = Math.max(1, Math.min(5, parseInt(n,10)||2));
    try { localStorage.setItem("tx_comp_level", String(n)); } catch(e){}
    updateLevelBadge();
    refreshQuizzes();
  };
  function refreshQuizzes(){
    Array.prototype.forEach.call(document.querySelectorAll("[data-quiz]"), function(m){ m.removeAttribute("data-bound"); });
    bindQuiz();
  }
  window.refreshQuizzes = refreshQuizzes;

  /* ---------- COLLAPSIBLE TOOLS MENU (single ☰ button) ---------- */
  function setToolsToggleLabel(open){
    var tg=document.getElementById("toolsToggle");
    if(tg){
      tg.innerHTML = open ? "\u2715 Close" : "\u2630 Menu";
      tg.setAttribute("aria-label", open ? "Close class menu" : "Open class menu");
    }
  }
  window.toggleTools = function(){
    var t=document.getElementById("tools"); if(!t) return;
    var open = t.classList.toggle("open");
    setToolsToggleLabel(open);
  };
  function closeTools(){
    var t=document.getElementById("tools");
    if(t && t.classList.contains("open")){ t.classList.remove("open"); setToolsToggleLabel(false); }
  }
  document.addEventListener("click", function(e){
    var t=document.getElementById("tools");
    if(!t || !t.classList.contains("open")) return;
    var tg=document.getElementById("toolsToggle");
    if(tg && (e.target===tg || tg.contains(e.target))) return;     // the toggle handles itself
    if(e.target.closest && e.target.closest(".tools-items")){ closeTools(); return; } // picked a tool → collapse
    if(!t.contains(e.target)) closeTools();                        // clicked elsewhere → collapse
  });

  /* ---------- RENDER ---------- */
  function render(){
    deck.innerHTML = "";
    SLIDES.forEach(function(s, i){
      var el = document.createElement("section");
      el.className = "slide" + (i===0 ? " active" : "");
      el.setAttribute("data-id", s.id);
      el.innerHTML = s.deck;
      // Deep-dive trigger: every slide carrying a deep-dive paper gets a button to
      // open it. Without this the parchment layer is unreachable, because the deck
      // HTML itself emits no [data-deep] control. Skip if the deck already has one.
      if (s.paper && !el.querySelector("[data-deep]")) {
        var ddOpen = document.createElement("button");
        ddOpen.className = "deepbtn deepdive-open";
        ddOpen.setAttribute("type", "button");
        ddOpen.setAttribute("data-deep", s.id);
        ddOpen.innerHTML = "\uD83D\uDCD6 Read the deep dive \u2192";
        el.appendChild(ddOpen);
      }
      el.addEventListener("scroll", function(){ updateScrollCue(); }, {passive:true});
      deck.appendChild(el);
    });
    bindDeepButtons();
    bindDiagrams();
    bindQuiz();
    bindGlossary();
    bindHeatmap();
    bindCitations();
    bindTiles();
    update();
    buildQR();
  }

  /* ---------- HEAT MAP interactive cells ---------- */
  function bindHeatmap(){
    var tip = document.getElementById("glosstip");
    if(!tip){ tip = document.createElement("div"); tip.id="glosstip"; tip.className="glosstip"; document.body.appendChild(tip); }
    function place(el){
      var r = el.getBoundingClientRect();
      tip.style.left = Math.min(Math.max(12, r.left), window.innerWidth - tip.offsetWidth - 12) + "px";
      var top = r.bottom + 8;
      if(top + tip.offsetHeight > window.innerHeight - 12) top = r.top - tip.offsetHeight - 8;
      tip.style.top = top + "px";
    }
    function show(el){
      var hint = el.getAttribute("data-dd") ? "<div class='gt-rel'><span>Click</span> for the full detail + deep dive</div>" : "";
      tip.innerHTML = "<div class='gt-term'>"+(el.getAttribute("data-head")||"")+"</div><div class='gt-def'>"+(el.getAttribute("data-detail")||"")+"</div>"+hint;
      tip.classList.add("show");
      tip.style.left="-9999px"; tip.style.top="0";
      requestAnimationFrame(function(){ place(el); });
    }
    function hide(){ tip.classList.remove("show"); }
    var _hmHideT = null;
    function hideSoon(){ if(_hmHideT) clearTimeout(_hmHideT); _hmHideT = setTimeout(hide, 260); }
    // keep the shared tooltip alive while the pointer is over it (so the user can move
    // from the region to the tooltip without it vanishing)
    if(tip.getAttribute("data-hmhoverbound")!=="1"){
      tip.setAttribute("data-hmhoverbound","1");
      tip.addEventListener("mouseenter", function(){ if(_hmHideT){ clearTimeout(_hmHideT); _hmHideT=null; } });
      tip.addEventListener("mouseleave", hideSoon);
    }
    Array.prototype.forEach.call(document.querySelectorAll(".hmcell, .hmzone"), function(el){
      if(el.getAttribute("data-hmbound")==="1") return;
      el.setAttribute("data-hmbound","1");
      // hover: lightweight tooltip; closes shortly after the pointer leaves (grace period
      // lets the user reach the tooltip itself)
      el.addEventListener("mouseenter", function(){ if(_hmHideT){ clearTimeout(_hmHideT); _hmHideT=null; } if(!document.getElementById("tileModal").classList.contains("open")) show(el); });
      el.addEventListener("mouseleave", hideSoon);
      // click: full detail modal (carries deep-dive + source links if present)
      el.addEventListener("click", function(e){
        e.stopPropagation();
        if(_hmHideT){ clearTimeout(_hmHideT); _hmHideT=null; }
        hide();
        if(window.openTile) window.openTile(el);
        else show(el);
      });
      // add an affordance hint to the hover tooltip via a flag the show() picks up
      el.setAttribute("data-clickable","1");
    });
  }

  function bindDeepButtons(){
    Array.prototype.forEach.call(document.querySelectorAll(".deepbtn"), function(b){
      b.addEventListener("click", function(){ openPaper(b.getAttribute("data-deep")); });
    });
  }

  /* ---------- INTERACTIVE DIAGRAMS ---------- */
  /* Desktop: diagrams enlarge on hover (pure CSS). Touch devices have no hover,
     so on touch we enable tap-to-open a full-screen, pinch-zoomable view. */
  var IS_TOUCH = ('ontouchstart' in window) || (navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0);
  function bindDiagrams(){
    if(!IS_TOUCH) return; // desktop uses CSS hover; nothing to bind
    Array.prototype.forEach.call(document.querySelectorAll(".diagram-wrap"), function(wrap){
      wrap.style.cursor = "zoom-in";
      wrap.addEventListener("click", function(){
        var svg = wrap.querySelector("svg");
        if(!svg) return;
        var box = document.getElementById("lbcontent");
        if(!box) return;
        box.innerHTML = "";
        var clone = svg.cloneNode(true);
        var vb = (clone.getAttribute("viewBox") || "0 0 900 560").split(/\s+/).map(Number);
        var ar = (vb[2] && vb[3]) ? (vb[2]/vb[3]) : 1.6;
        var maxW = window.innerWidth * 0.96, maxH = window.innerHeight * 0.86;
        var cw = maxW, ch = cw / ar;
        if(ch > maxH){ ch = maxH; cw = ch * ar; }
        clone.setAttribute("width", Math.round(cw));
        clone.setAttribute("height", Math.round(ch));
        clone.setAttribute("style", "display:block;max-width:none;");
        box.appendChild(clone);
        document.getElementById("lightbox").classList.add("open");
      });
    });
  }
  function closeLightbox(){ var l=document.getElementById("lightbox"); if(l){ l.classList.remove("open"); var c=document.getElementById("lbcontent"); if(c) c.innerHTML=""; } }

  /* ---------- COMPREHENSION-CHECK QUIZ (one question at a time) ---------- */
  function bindQuiz(){
    // Multiple quiz mounts exist (pop-quizzes + final quiz). getElementById would
    // only catch the first, so select every mount by its data-quiz attribute.
    var mounts = document.querySelectorAll("[data-quiz]");
    Array.prototype.forEach.call(mounts, function(m){ bindOneQuiz(m); });
  }
  function bindOneQuiz(mount){
    if(!mount) return;
    if(mount.getAttribute("data-bound")==="1") return; // don't re-bind
    mount.setAttribute("data-bound","1");
    var ALLQ;
    try { ALLQ = JSON.parse(mount.getAttribute("data-quiz")); } catch(e){ ALLQ = null; }
    if(!ALLQ || !ALLQ.length){ mount.innerHTML = "<p class='dim'>Quiz unavailable.</p>"; return; }

    var IS_POP = mount.getAttribute("data-pop") === "1";
    var LVL = compLevel();
    var LVLNAME = compMeta(LVL).label;
    // Difficulty tied to comprehension level: show every question whose minimum
    // level (q.level, default 1) is at or below the chosen level. Higher level = more,
    // harder questions surface. Always keep at least one question.
    var Q = ALLQ.filter(function(q){ return (q.level||1) <= LVL; });
    if(!Q.length) Q = ALLQ.slice(0,1);

    var i = 0, scoreMap = {}; // best fractional score (0..1) achieved per question
    var answered = false;

    function esc(t){ var d=document.createElement("div"); d.textContent=t; return d.innerHTML; }
    function norm(s){ return (s||"").toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9 ]/g,"").replace(/\s+/g," ").trim(); }
    function totalScore(){ var s=0; for(var k in scoreMap){ s+=scoreMap[k]; } return s; }
    function setScore(idx, v){ scoreMap[idx] = Math.max(scoreMap[idx]||0, v); }

    function renderQ(){
      answered = false;
      var q = Q[i];
      var typeLabel = q.type==="mc" ? "Multiple choice" : q.type==="tf" ? "True / False" : "Short answer · AI-graded";
      var h = "";
      var lvlChip = "<span class='quiz-lvl' title='Comprehension level — change it with the ◎ Level button'>Lv"+LVL+" · "+esc(LVLNAME)+"</span>";
      if(IS_POP){
        h += "<div class='quiz-head'><span class='quiz-type'>"+typeLabel+"</span>"+lvlChip+"</div>";
      } else {
        h += "<div class='quiz-head'><span class='quiz-prog'>Question "+(i+1)+" of "+Q.length+"</span><span class='quiz-type'>"+typeLabel+"</span>"+lvlChip+"<span class='quiz-score'>Score: "+(Math.round(totalScore()*10)/10)+"</span></div>";
      }
      h += "<div class='quiz-q'>"+esc(q.q)+"</div>";

      if(q.type==="mc"){
        h += "<div class='quiz-opts'>";
        for(var k=0;k<q.options.length;k++){ h += "<button class='quiz-opt' data-k='"+k+"'>"+esc(q.options[k])+"</button>"; }
        h += "</div>";
      } else if(q.type==="tf"){
        h += "<div class='quiz-opts'><button class='quiz-opt' data-tf='true'>True</button><button class='quiz-opt' data-tf='false'>False</button></div>";
      } else {
        var ph = LVL>=4 ? "Explain in your own words…" : "Type your answer…";
        h += "<div class='quiz-sa'><textarea id='quizSA' rows='"+(LVL>=4?4:3)+"' placeholder='"+ph+"' autocomplete='off'></textarea><button class='quiz-submit' id='quizSubmit'>Submit for AI grading</button><div class='quiz-sahint'>Tip: press Ctrl/⌘ + Enter to submit. You'll be graded for a "+esc(LVLNAME)+" level.</div></div>";
      }
      h += "<div class='quiz-fb' id='quizFb'></div>";
      if(IS_POP){
        h += "<div class='quiz-nav'><span class='quiz-pophint' id='quizNext' style='display:none'>Swipe or tap → to continue</span></div>";
      } else {
        h += "<div class='quiz-nav'><button class='quiz-next' id='quizNext' style='display:none'>"+(i<Q.length-1?"Next question →":"See results →")+"</button></div>";
      }
      mount.innerHTML = h;

      Array.prototype.forEach.call(mount.querySelectorAll(".quiz-opt"), function(btn){
        btn.addEventListener("click", function(){
          if(answered) return;
          if(q.type==="mc") grade(parseInt(btn.getAttribute("data-k"),10), btn);
          else grade(btn.getAttribute("data-tf")==="true", btn);
        });
      });
      var sub = mount.querySelector("#quizSubmit");
      if(sub){
        sub.addEventListener("click", gradeSA);
        var inp=mount.querySelector("#quizSA");
        inp.addEventListener("keydown", function(e){ if(e.key==="Enter" && (e.ctrlKey||e.metaKey)){ e.preventDefault(); gradeSA(); } });
        inp.focus();
      }
      var nx = mount.querySelector("#quizNext");
      if(nx && !IS_POP) nx.addEventListener("click", function(){ i++; if(i<Q.length) renderQ(); else results(); });
    }

    function lockOpts(){ Array.prototype.forEach.call(mount.querySelectorAll(".quiz-opt"), function(b){ b.disabled=true; }); }
    function showNext(){ var n=mount.querySelector("#quizNext"); if(n) n.style.display=""; }
    function showRetry(label){
      var nav=mount.querySelector(".quiz-nav");
      if(!nav) return;
      nav.innerHTML="<button class='quiz-next quiz-retry' id='quizRetryQ'>"+(label||"Try this question again ↺")+"</button>"
                  + (IS_POP?"":" <button class='quiz-next quiz-skip' id='quizSkipQ'>Skip →</button>");
      mount.querySelector("#quizRetryQ").addEventListener("click", function(){ renderQ(); });
      var sk=mount.querySelector("#quizSkipQ");
      if(sk) sk.addEventListener("click", function(){ i++; if(i<Q.length) renderQ(); else results(); });
    }
    function feedback(kind, html){
      var fb=mount.querySelector("#quizFb");
      var head = kind==="ok" ? "✓ Correct" : kind==="partial" ? "◑ Partly right" : kind==="grading" ? "" : "✗ Not quite";
      fb.className="quiz-fb "+(kind==="ok"?"ok":kind==="partial"?"partial":kind==="grading"?"grading":"no");
      fb.innerHTML=(head?"<b>"+head+"</b> — ":"")+html;
    }

    function grade(choice, btn){
      answered=true; lockOpts();
      var q=Q[i]; var correct=q.answer; var ok=(choice===correct);
      Array.prototype.forEach.call(mount.querySelectorAll(".quiz-opt"), function(b){
        var isCorrect = q.type==="mc" ? (parseInt(b.getAttribute("data-k"),10)===correct) : (b.getAttribute("data-tf")===String(correct));
        if(isCorrect) b.classList.add("correct");
      });
      if(ok){
        setScore(i,1);
        trackParticipation("quiz_attempt", { score: 1, type: q.type });
        feedback("ok", esc(q.why||"")); showNext();
      } else {
        trackParticipation("quiz_attempt", { score: 0, type: q.type });
        btn.classList.add("wrong");
        feedback("no", esc(q.why||"")); showRetry();
      }
    }

    // ----- AI-graded short answer (difficulty scales with comprehension level) -----
    function gradeSA(){
      if(answered) return;
      var ta = mount.querySelector("#quizSA");
      var raw = (ta.value||"").trim();
      if(!raw) return;
      answered=true;
      ta.disabled=true;
      var sub=mount.querySelector("#quizSubmit"); if(sub){ sub.disabled=true; }
      feedback("grading", "<span class='quiz-spin'></span> Grading your answer for a <b>"+esc(LVLNAME)+"</b> level…");
      var q=Q[i];
      gradeWithAI(q, raw, function(res){
        var sc = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (res && typeof res.score==="number") ? res.score : 0));
        setScore(i, sc);
        trackParticipation("quiz_attempt", { score: sc, type: q.type });
        var verdict = res && res.verdict;
        var fbText = esc((res && res.feedback) || "");
        var model = q.sample ? "<div class='quiz-model'><b>A strong answer:</b> "+esc(q.sample)+"</div>" : "";
        ta.classList.add(verdict==="correct"?"correct":verdict==="partial"?"partial":"wrong");
        if(verdict==="correct"){
          feedback("ok", fbText); showNext();
        } else if(verdict==="partial"){
          feedback("partial", fbText+model); showNext(); // partial credit counts; still let them move on
          // also allow a retry to improve
          var nav=mount.querySelector(".quiz-nav");
          if(nav){ var b=document.createElement("button"); b.className="quiz-next quiz-retry"; b.textContent="Improve your answer ↺"; b.onclick=function(){ renderQ(); }; nav.appendChild(b); }
        } else {
          feedback("no", fbText+model); showRetry();
        }
      });
    }

    function gradeWithAI(q, answer, done){
      var payload = {
        question: q.q,
        rubric: q.rubric || q.why || "",
        sample: q.sample || "",
        answer: answer,
        level: LVL,
        levelName: LVLNAME
      };
      var fell = false;
      var timer = setTimeout(function(){ if(!fell){ fell=true; done(localGrade(q, answer)); } }, 15000);
      fetch("/api/grade", {
        method:"POST", headers:{"content-type":"application/json"}, body: JSON.stringify(payload)
      }).then(function(r){ return r.ok ? r.json() : Promise.reject(r.status); })
        .then(function(j){
          if(fell) return; fell=true; clearTimeout(timer);
          if(j && j.verdict){ done(j); } else { done(localGrade(q, answer)); }
        })
        .catch(function(){ if(fell) return; fell=true; clearTimeout(timer); done(localGrade(q, answer)); });
    }

    // Offline / no-key fallback: keyword match if the question provides accept[].
    function localGrade(q, answer){
      var val = norm(answer);
